name: Edric Vaun
role: Reassigned Conclave scholar, formerly geometry-text analyst
visualDescriptor: narrow-faced, ink-stained cuffs, carries an unread ledger like a shield
persona: A careful scholar whose careful question got him removed from the work he cared about. Speaks in precise low Avelornian. Not brave but not dishonest — will tell the truth to someone who asks without leverage.
canon: Argued the passive-anchor reading of the fifth convergence point was a transcription error, not a deliberate Covenant choice
Was reassigned to component-transport duty by Vorn six days ago as punishment for raising the completeness question
Confirmed the geometric window opens in twenty-two days, not thirty-one — a non-public figure
Confirmed staging camp is at Thornheel, three miles into the foothills past Greyveil bridge
Told Ming: if the geometry inverts, the re-binding becomes an immediate rupture-accelerant
Drinks alone at Lamplighter's Arch after late shift
Speaks only Avelornian and Conclave formal script
